display_text: Witch Doctor Aghanim's Scepter: Death Ward attacks bounce between nearby enemies. This upgrade counters clustered enemy formations by amplifying damage output against grouped targets, turning Witch Doctor into a teamfight powerhouse that punishes poor positioning.
search_text: Witch Doctor Aghanim Scepter Death Ward bounce teamfight anti-cluster anti-grouping damage amplification

display_text: Witch Doctor Aghanim's Shard: Voodoo Switcheroo turns Witch Doctor into a Death Ward briefly while hidden. This upgrade counters direct targeting and burst damage, allowing Witch Doctor to reposition safely or continue dealing damage while evading enemy focus.
search_text: Witch Doctor Aghanim Shard Voodoo Switcheroo anti-targeting anti-burst reposition evasion hidden damage
